title: SEALAPACK® SAP053 HEALTHY EGG POACHING BAGS, PACK OF 10, Clean
features: POACHED PERFECTION: Sealapack Egg Poaching Bags are a quick, easy way to enjoy perfect poached eggs every time!
CLEAN COOKING: Use these clever poaching bags, for a cleaner way to enjoy the perfect poached egg. After cooking, simply remove the egg and dispose of the bag
HEALTHY COOKING: Poaching bags require no oil, butter or vinegar adding to them. Add multiple bags of eggs to the pan at the same time
QUICK MEAL: Create a classic Eggs Benedict, whilst the eggs poach, you are free to prepare a toasted muffin and bacon ready to top with the perfect poached egg
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: PACK OF 10 BAGS
